name: Fuzzing Setup V2 Workflow
description: Setup V2: Migration, scaffolding, implementation, and validation

steps.name: Phase 0: Foundry Migration
steps.description: Migrate Hardhat project to Foundry and ensure compilation
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-0.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-0 agent using the Task tool. This phase will migrate the project to Foundry (if needed) and verify compilation.

steps.name: Generate Recon Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate fuzzing scaffolding based on contracts-to-scaffold.json
steps.prompt: SCAFFOLD_FILE=$([ -f magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json ] && echo 'magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json' || echo '../magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json'); MOCK_NAMES=$(jq -r 'if .mocked_contracts | length > 0 then .mocked_contracts | join(",") else empty end' $SCAFFOLD_FILE); npx -y recon-generate@latest --include "$(jq -r '.source_contracts | join(",")' $SCAFFOLD_FILE)" ${MOCK_NAMES:+--mock "$MOCK_NAMES"} --coverage --force

steps.name: Phase 1: Install Dependencies and Create Mocks
steps.description: Install chimera, create remaining mock contracts, and verify compilation
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-1 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 2: Implement Setup.sol
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-2.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-2 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 3: Validate Setup
steps.description: Validate setup with forge build, forge test, and echidna
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-3.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-3 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Extract Target Functions
steps.description: Extract all target handler functions from scaffolded code

steps.name: Phase 5: Identify Prerequisite Functions
steps.description: Analyze each handler and identify prerequisite functions
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-5.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-5 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Order Prerequisite Functions
steps.description: Sort functions by prerequisite count for testing order

steps.name: Phase 6: Move Admin Functions
steps.description: Identify and move admin functions to AdminTargets
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-6.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-6 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 7: Write Unit Tests
steps.description: Write unit tests for all handlers to validate setup
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/setup-v2-phase-7.md. Run exclusively the setup-v2-phase-7 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Final Echidna Validation
steps.description: Run Echidna to validate complete setup
steps.prompt: (set -o pipefail; echidna . --contract CryticTester --config echidna.yaml --format text --test-limit 10000 2>&1 | tee magic/echidna-output.txt; echo "ECHIDNA_EXIT_CODE=$?" > magic/echidna-exit-code.txt) || true

steps.name: Setup V2 Completion Summary
steps.description: Generate final summary of setup completion
steps.prompt:
Create a file called FUZZING_SETUP_COMPLETE.md that summarizes:
1. Successfully completed all phases
2. List key artifacts: Setup.sol, target-functions.json, function-sequences.json, admin-functions.json
3. Confirm forge build compiles successfully
4. Confirm forge test runs without reverts
5. Confirm echidna runs without setup crashes
6. Next steps: proceed to Coverage workflow
